lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਗਾ ॥੮॥੬॥
lines.translit: so sevak naanak jis bhaagaa |8|6|
lines.english: He alone is the Lord's servant, O Nanak, who is so blessed. ||8||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਕੋ ਲਾਇਆ ਤਿਤ ਹੀ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit ko laaeaa tith hee laagaa |
lines.english: As the Lord attaches someone, so is he attached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਜੈਸੇ ਸਰਪ ਆਰਜਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran jaise sarap aarajaaree |
lines.english: Without meditating in remembrance on the Lord, one's life is like that of a snake.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਜੋ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਮਹਿ ਜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: ek nimakh jo simaran meh jeea |
lines.english: One who lives in meditative remembrance, even for an instant,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਸਾਕਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਿਸਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiau jeeveh saakat naam bisaaree |1|
lines.english: This is how the faithless cynic lives, forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਦਿਨਸ ਲਾਖ ਸਦਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਥੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott dinas laakh sadaa thir theea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: lives for hundreds of thousands and millions of days, and becomes stable forever. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran dhrig karam karaas |
lines.english: Without meditating in remembrance on the Lord, one's actions and works are cursed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਬੇਸੁਆ ਪੂਤ ਨਿਨਾਮ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saakat besuaa poot ninaam |3|
lines.english: The faithless cynic is nameless, like the prostitute's son. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਗ ਬਤਨ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਮਹਿ ਵਾਸ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaag batan bisattaa meh vaas |2|
lines.english: Like the crow's beak, he dwells in manure. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਭਏ ਕੂਕਰ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran bhe kookar kaam |
lines.english: Without meditating in remembrance on the Lord, one acts like a dog.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਗਰਧਭ ਕੀ ਨਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran garadhabh kee niaaee |
lines.english: Without meditating in remembrance on the Lord, one is like a donkey.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਜੈਸੇ ਸੀਙ ਛਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran jaise seeng chhataaraa |
lines.english: Without meditating in remembrance on the Lord, one is like a horned ram.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲਹਿ ਕੂਰੁ ਸਾਕਤ ਮੁਖੁ ਕਾਰਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: boleh koor saakat mukh kaaraa |4|
lines.english: The faithless cynic barks out his lies, and his face is blackened. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਲੋਭੀ ਬੰਧੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: saakat lobhee bandh na paaeaa |6|
lines.english: The greedy, faithless cynic falls into entanglements. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਕੂਕਰ ਹਰਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran kookar harakaaeaa |
lines.english: Without meditating in remembrance on the Lord, one is like a mad dog.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਥਾਨ ਭਰਿਸਟ ਫਿਰਾਹੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saakat thaan bharisatt firaahee |5|
lines.english: The faithless cynic wanders around in polluted places. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਹੈ ਆਤਮ ਘਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran hai aatam ghaatee |
lines.english: Without meditating in remembrance on the Lord, he murders his own soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਭਇਆ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਤਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis bheaa kripaal tis satasang milaaeaa |
lines.english: When the Lord becomes merciful, one joins the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਨੀਚ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੁਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਤੀ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: saakat neech tis kul nahee jaatee |7|
lines.english: The faithless cynic is wretched, without family or social standing. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan mohi param gat paaee |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, I have attained the supreme status.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥੮॥੭॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak gur jagat taraaeaa |8|7|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the Guru has saved the world. ||8||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਮੇਰੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur poorai meree paij rakhaaee |1|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has preserved my honor. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਓ ਮੋਹਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan dhiaaeo mohi naau |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, I meditate on the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਰਸਨ ਵਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan sun rasan vakhaanee |
lines.english: I listen to the Guru's Word, and chant it with my tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਮੇਰੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te amrit meree baanee |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, my speech is like nectar. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਥਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad mohi miliaa thaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have obtained a place of rest. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਦਇਆ ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਵਡ ਪਰਤਾਪੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kee deaa te meraa vadd parataap |3|
lines.english: Through the Guru's kindness, I have obtained glorious greatness. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਆਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan mittiaa meraa aap |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, my selfishness and conceit have been removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਸਭੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan pekhio sabh braham |4|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, I see God everywhere. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਕੀਨੋ ਰਾਜੁ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan keeno raaj jog |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, I practice Raja Yoga, the Yoga of meditation and success.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਭਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan mittiaa meraa bharam |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, my doubts have been removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਉ ਨਿਧਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan paaeaa naau nidh |6|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, I have obtained the nine treasures. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਿਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan mere kaaraj sidh |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, my affairs are resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਰਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਲੋਗੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur kai sang tariaa sabh log |5|
lines.english: In the Company of the Guru, all the people of the world are saved. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਨੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin jin keenee mere gur kee aasaa |
lines.english: Whoever places his hopes in my Guru,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਜਾਗਿਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਕਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan jaagiaa meraa karam |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, my good karma has been awakened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕਟੀਐ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tis kee katteeai jam kee faasaa |7|
lines.english: has the noose of death cut away. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਸਿਮਰਉ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kau simrau saas saas |
lines.english: I remember the Guru with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ॥੮॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak gur bhettiaa paarabraham |8|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting with the Guru, I have found the Supreme Lord God. ||8||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਦੇਖਿ ਜੀਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa darasan dekh dekh jeevaa |
lines.english: Beholding the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan, I live.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਰੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur mere praan satigur meree raas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Guru is my breath of life, the True Guru is my wealth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਧੋਇ ਧੋਇ ਪੀਵਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan dhoe dhoe peevaa |1|
lines.english: I wash the Guru's Feet, and drink in this water. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਹਰਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: janam janam kee haumai mal hrau |2|
lines.english: The egotistical filth of countless incarnations is washed off. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਨਿਤ ਮਜਨੁ ਕਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee ren nit majan krau |
lines.english: I take my daily bath in the dust of the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਢੋਵਉ ਪਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kai grihi dtovau paanee |
lines.english: I carry water for the Guru's household;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਝੂਲਾਵਉ ਪਾਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kau jhoolaavau paakhaa |
lines.english: I wave the fan over the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਤੇ ਹਾਥੁ ਦੇ ਰਾਖਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mahaa agan te haath de raakhaa |3|
lines.english: Giving me His Hand, He has saved me from the great fire. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਵੈਰੀ ਸਭ ਮੀਤ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jis parasaad vairee sabh meet |5|
lines.english: By His Grace, all my enemies have become friends. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਪੀਸਉ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kai grihi peesau neet |
lines.english: I grind the corn for the Guru's household.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਅਕਲ ਗਤਿ ਜਾਣੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis gur te akal gat jaanee |4|
lines.english: from the Guru, I have learned the Way of the One Lord. ||4||
